title: Aurin's ShinobiCraft Icons
body:
This resourcepack has been made to give a HD appearance to the Nature Releases, Kekkei Genkai and some other things. It'll only works with **AHZNB's Naruto ShinobiCraft Mod**.

At the moment my only goal it's to remake the Nature Releases and Kekkei Genkai of Nature (like Storm Release and etc.).

![Preview](https://imgur.com/B9qeswr.gif)

The resourcepacks counts at the moment (1.1.2 version) with **22 icons remade**, all done from scratch.

### Plans
- Remake Nature Releases/Kekkei Genkai from another Mods;
- ~~Remake Doujutsu Kekkei Genkai (such as Sharingan, Byakugan, etc.).~~
  
^
Done it on my [other pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/aurins-shinobicraft-eyes) (partially done atleast)
